name: Parsley and Chives Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 lb new potatoes, scrubbed and peeled
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes in water to cover. Bring to a boil and cook until tender, about 20 to 30 minutes.
2. Drain. Set aside.
3. In a saucepan, sauté the shallot in butter until tender.
4. Add the parsley, lemon juice, tarragon, and chives to taste. Season with salt and pepper.
5. When ready to serve, reheat the herb butter and add the potatoes, just to heat through.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
